name: vibesubin
description: A caring skill pack for vibe coders. Encodes engineering discipline — refactor verification, minimal security audit, repo rot detection, AI-friendly docs, CI/CD basics, secrets lifecycle, project conventions, repo bloat diagnosis, and design-system unification — as a set of portable agent skills, plus two direct-call-only helpers: a thin Claude Code + Codex wrapper (`codex-fix`) for post-edit review loops, and an issue-driven release-cycle orchestrator (`ship-cycle`) for planning and shipping versions.
